content.cn_text: 第二部分。你有一些时间查看第11至16题。
content.en_text: Section 2. You have some time to look at questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 好的，首先我会给大家介绍一点博物馆的背景，然后告诉大家
content.en_text: Okay, well first of all I'll give you a bit of background to the museum and then tell you

content.cn_text: 一些展厅的情况。你们今天可能没有时间看完所有内容，所以我
content.en_text: about some of the galleries. You probably won't have time to see everything today so whatever

content.cn_text: 建议你们先去埃及展厅，因为那里是大家最喜欢的地方，而且
content.en_text: recommend you do is go to the Egyptian Room first because it's everyone's favorite place and it

content.cn_text: 当天晚些时候会被学校团体挤满。哦，我还应该提一下，
content.en_text: gets very crowded with the school parties later in the day. Oh and I should mention that the

content.cn_text: 摄影展厅目前正在翻新，所以虽然它绝对值得
content.en_text: photography gallery's undergoing refurbishment at the moment so while that's definitely worth

content.cn_text: 参观，但只能等下次了。现在，博物馆建筑本身也相当有意思。
content.en_text: seeing it'll have to wait for another time. Now the actual museum building itself is quite interesting.

content.cn_text: 它由一位名叫 William Craven 的本地建筑师在19世纪设计，当时
content.en_text: It was designed by a local architect called William Craven in the 19th century at a time when

content.cn_text: 这座城市随着纺织业扩张而快速发展，出现了新的工厂。
content.en_text: the city was developing rapidly with new factories to cope with the expansion of the textile industry.

content.cn_text: 博物馆的建筑风格与火车站非常相似，火车站建于
content.en_text: The museum's built in a very similar style to the railway station which was constructed at

content.cn_text: 大约同一时期。火车站是由另一位建筑师设计的，但 William Craven 确实也提供了
content.en_text: around the same time. That was designed by another architect but William Craven did also provide

content.cn_text: 市政厅的设计方案，市政厅是在几年后建成的。博物馆的建造
content.en_text: the plans for the town hall which was built just a few years later. Construction of the museum

content.cn_text: 始于1888年，由一大批木匠、石匠和建筑工人完成。近年来，它
content.en_text: began in 1888 with a large team of carpenters, stone masons and builders. Then in recent years it's

content.cn_text: 经过了大规模翻新。漂亮的大窗户被保留下来，让自然光照进来，
content.en_text: been extensively refurbished. The lovely big windows have been retained to let the daylight flood in

content.cn_text: 但该项目获奖的部分是中央大厅周围区域的修复。
content.en_text: but the award-winning part of the project was the restoration of the area around the central hall.

content.cn_text: 尤其是那座美丽的锻铁楼梯，它被恢复到了昔日的辉煌。
content.en_text: In particular the beautiful wrought iron staircase which was brought back to its former glory.

content.cn_text: 遗憾的是，博物馆原来的瓷砖地面不得不用类似设计的新瓷砖替换。
content.en_text: Unfortunately the museum's original tiled floor had to be replaced with new tiles of a similar design.

content.cn_text: 这是一个非常昂贵的项目，而且由于我们不收门票，所以必须寻找其他方式
content.en_text: It was a very expensive project and since we don't charge admission fees we had to find other ways

content.cn_text: 为其筹资。我们确实从国家层面的文化部门获得了一些资金，
content.en_text: of funding it. We did get some money from the Department of Culture at National Level

content.cn_text: 但我们从本市的公司和行业获得了更慷慨的支持，它们是我们的
content.en_text: but we had even more generous support from companies and industries here in the city who were our

content.cn_text: 主要资助者。不过，我们也依靠当地居民的捐款来进行建筑的
content.en_text: main benefactors. However we do also depend on donations from people living in the area for the

content.cn_text: 持续维护。那么，博物馆未来五年主要会把资金花在什么地方呢？
content.en_text: ongoing maintenance of the building. So how will the museum mainly be spending its money in the

content.cn_text: 我们已经与学校和学院合作，帮助人们更好地理解
content.en_text: next five years? We already work with schools and colleges helping people get a better understanding

content.cn_text: 所有创意学科。我们认为我们工作中最重要的部分是修复
content.en_text: of all the creative disciplines. We consider the most important part of our work the restoration

content.cn_text: 我们有幸收藏的珍贵历史物品，而这将继续
content.en_text: of the valuable historical objects we are lucky enough to have in our possession and this will continue

content.cn_text: 是分配最多资金的领域。当然，如果能购买新藏品会很棒，
content.en_text: to be where the most funding is allocated. Of course it would be wonderful to purchase new objects

content.cn_text: 但目前我们实在没有空间。
content.en_text: for the museum but we simply don't have the space at the moment.

content.cn_text: 我们确实希望你们今天过得愉快，但如果你们想更多了解我们的展品，
content.en_text: Well we do hope you enjoy your day today but if you would like to learn more about our exhibits

content.cn_text: 我建议你们参加周六上午的讲座，这些讲座
content.en_text: on display here I suggest you come to one of the Saturday morning lectures which are given

content.cn_text: 每个月由我们专家团队中的一位主讲。当然，你们也可以领取关于展品的传单，
content.en_text: every month by one of our team of experts. Of course you can pick up leaflets about the exhibits

content.cn_text: 以及大多数展厅的传单，但你只能从中获得基本介绍。我们也在
content.en_text: and most of the galleries too but you'll only get a basic introduction from those. We're also

content.cn_text: 努力更新我们的网站，让它提供更多展品背景信息，但这仍处于
content.en_text: working to update our website so that it provides more background on the exhibits but that's still at

content.cn_text: 规划阶段。在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第17
content.en_text: the planning stage. Before you hear the rest of the talk you have some time to look at question 17

content.cn_text: 至20题，在第4页。
content.en_text: to 20 on page 4.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第17至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: 好的，现在我来简单介绍一下目前正在展出的内容。
content.en_text: Okay now let me just tell you a bit about what's on at the moment.

content.cn_text: 我们以收藏18世纪绘画而闻名，包括油画和水彩画。
content.en_text: Well we're very well known for our collection of 18th century paintings both oils and watercolors.

content.cn_text: 其中一些是英国风景画和肖像画，但我们也有其他
content.en_text: Some of these are English landscapes and portraits but we also have paintings by other

content.cn_text: 欧洲艺术家在这一时期创作的画作。如果你对更
content.en_text: European artists who were working during this period. If you're interested in art that's a bit

content.cn_text: 接近本地的艺术感兴趣，Farnley collection 是 Paul Farnley 的一组绘画。他出生在爱尔兰，
content.en_text: nearer home the Farnley collection is a set of drawings by Paul Farnley. He was born in Ireland

content.cn_text: 但在20世纪初来到这座城市工作，并把这里当作自己的家。
content.en_text: but he came to work here in the city in the early 20th century and then made it his home.

content.cn_text: 他在一家工厂工作，但业余时间会画这座城市的建筑和城市景观，
content.en_text: He worked on a factory but spent his spare time drawing the buildings and urban landscape

content.cn_text: 他的作品现在已经被收藏并在这里展出。说到更实用的东西，
content.en_text: of the city and his work has now been collected and displayed here. On a more practical note we

content.cn_text: 我们有一个厨房电器展，可能会让你感兴趣。这些是你
content.en_text: have a display of kitchen appliances which might interest you. These are the sorts of things you

content.cn_text: 通常不会想到会在博物馆里看到的东西。其中有一台来自20世纪70年代的电动削土豆器，
content.en_text: wouldn't normally expect to see in a museum. There's an electric potato peeler from the 1970s which

content.cn_text: 当时卖得很好，但现在已经没人有了。还有很多类似的电器，
content.en_text: sold really well at the time but no one's got one now. There are lots of other similar appliances

content.cn_text: 在当时一定看起来是很棒的想法，但后来从未真正流行起来。
content.en_text: which must have seemed like great ideas at the time but which never took off.

content.cn_text: 你们可能也想参观时装展厅。这是一个展览，将只持续
content.en_text: You might also like to visit the fashion gallery. This is an exhibition which is running for the

content.cn_text: 接下来几周，展示1900年至2000年的男女时装，包括当时一些
content.en_text: next few weeks only and shows men's and women's fashion from 1900 to 2000 including some of the

content.cn_text: 著名设计师的作品。好了，如果有人有问题，请跟我来。
content.en_text: famous designers of the time. Okay so if anyone's got any questions follow me.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到第三部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 3.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11–16

items.title: What does the tour guide advise the visitors to do in the museum today?

options.title: A
options.content: see the most popular exhibits first

options.title: B
options.content: pay a brief visit to each gallery

options.title: C
options.content: go to the photography gallery last

items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问导游建议游客今天在博物馆做什么，原文说 go to the Egyptian Room first，因为它最受欢迎，对应 A “see the most popular exhibits first”。

items.title: The museum was designed by William Craven, who also designed
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问 William Craven 还设计了什么，原文说 provided the plans for the town hall，因此答案是 B。

items.title: The museum won an award for the preservation of the
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问博物馆因保护什么而获奖，原文说 award-winning part... in particular the staircase，因此答案是 A。

items.title: Most of the money for the project came from
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问项目大部分资金来自哪里，原文说 companies and industries in the city were our main benefactors，对应 C “local businesses”。

items.title: Over the next five years, the museum will invest mainly in
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问未来五年博物馆主要投资什么，原文说 restoration of valuable historical objects... most funding is allocated，对应 A “restoring existing collections”。

items.title: Visitors who are interested in learning more about the exhibits should
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问想更深入了解展品的游客应该做什么，原文说 come to Saturday morning lectures every month，对应 C “attend the monthly lectures”。

groups.desc: Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–F, next to Questions 17–20.
groups.title: Questions 17–20

list.title: A
list.content: has been shown in different museums

list.title: B
list.content: consists of work by a local resident

list.title: E
list.content: shows things that are no longer common

list.title: F
list.content: is on loan from a foreign museum

items.title: 18th-century paintings
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 18th-century paintings 的信息，原文说有 English 作品，也有其他 European artists 的作品，说明来自不同国家，对应 C。

items.title: Farnley collection
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Farnley collection 的信息，原文说 Paul Farnley 后来 made it his home，说明作品来自本地居民，对应 B。

items.title: kitchen appliances
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 kitchen appliances 的信息，原文说 no one’s got one now / never took off，说明展示的是现在不常见的东西，对应 E。

items.title: fashion gallery
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 fashion gallery 的信息，原文说 running for the next few weeks only，说明只是临时展出，对应 D。
